calendar.matters:
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Jan-28-2026 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Costs And Fees And/Or To Tax Costs And Fees Of Defendants, And Declaration Of Elizabeth Karnazes In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-30-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
No Appearance by Plaintiff.
Peter Kunstler, Esq. 310-745-3003 for Defendant.

Party states appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received from Plaintiff.
9:22am
ARGUED. No Appearance by Plaintiff. Mr. Kunstler responds to the notice of contest email from Plaintiff re $87.25. Counsel submits on the TR. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Elizabeth Karnazes's Motion To Strike Costs And Fees And/Or To Tax Costs And Fees Of Defendants is DENIED.

Defendants have established proper service of their cost memorandum. Defendants' $2,175 first appearance filing and motion fees (5 defendants at $435 per defendant) are recoverable and shall be recovered here. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 1033.5(a)(1).) Defendants' e-filing and related fees of at least $87.24 are recoverable and shall be recovered here. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 1033.5(a)(14).)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, For the Record (9:21:00 - 9:24:07) Reported.(302/JMQ)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Complaint; Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Joseph J. Rinaldi, David W. Brill, Richard Nielsen And Peter M. Kunstler
Off Calendar Nov-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Elizabeth Karnazes, Esq. 650-667-1370 Plaintiff in Pro Per
Peter Kunstler, Esq. 310-745-3003 for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice to contest the TR was received from Plaintiff. Before the hearing, an email was rcvd. from Plaintiff requesting to continue the hearing with an ADA request dated 8/18/25 attached. Mr. Kunstler objects to any further continuance since the matter is fully briefed. The Court denies the continuance request and the hearing proceeds.

Argued. Mr. Kunstler declares the timeline of the motion. Ms. Karnazes presents arguments; ADA request filed back in August, coordinated with ADA coordinator, judicila notice, witness is not present. Mr. Kunstler responds; motion on calendar for 6 months, fully briefed, jurisdictional issue, objects to further continuance and court can make a decisison. After full arguments, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs RINALDI LAW GROUP, LLC, BRILL & ASSOCIATES, PL, RICHARD NIELSEN, JOSEPH RINALDI, and DAVID BRILL's Motion To Quash Service Of Complaint.

Defendants' motion to quash service of Plaintiff's complaint.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, FTR (9:38:11 - 10:10:47) Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing the court signs an order on motion of defendants joseph j. rinaldi; david w brill; rinaldi law group, llc; brill & associates, pl; and richard nielsen to quash service of complaint. (see scanned order for details)

DEFENDANTs RINALDI LAW GROUP, LLC, BRILL & ASSOCIATES, PL, RICHARD NIELSEN, JOSEPH RINALDI, and DAVID BRILL's Motion To Quash Service Of Complaint.
